lines: Shall we build a bridge to the next island, {player}?
Anything is possible when we work together!
quest_offer_line: My maker-station is all out of gizmos. Could you help me find some more, {player}?
quest_progress_line: One gizmo here, two gadgets there... you're doing great, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Fantastic! Now I can finish my latest invention. Thank you, {player}!
